pi_items.source: Task instructions and verifier.py explicit checks
setup_task.sh downloads world-db.zip and loads world.sql
Parsed world.sql country table inserts, found 7 distinct continents (Africa, Antarctica, Asia, Europe, North America, Oceania, South America)
Parsed world.sql country table inserts, found 25 distinct regions, satisfying the minimum of 20
Parsed world.sql country table inserts, found 239 distinct countries, satisfying the minimum of 230
verifier.py checks for this exact path
Task instructions specify updating USA population by 1,000,000 and verifier.py checks country_audit for 'USA'
Task instructions and verifier.py specify testing fn_continent_avg_life_expectancy on 'Europe'

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a new target database 'world_regions' from the existing source database 'world', which originates from the public MySQL Sample world-db. Verified against the source data, the 'world' database contains 239 countries, 7 distinct continents, and 25 distinct regions, satisfying the minimum requirements of 230 countries and 20 regions. The expected outputs include testing the trigger with 'USA', testing the function with 'Europe', and exporting data to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/top20_countries.csv'. All metadata claims align with the actual data and verifier checks.
